<?php /** * PBKDF2params * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * PBKDF2params * * from https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2898#appendix-A.3 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class PBKDF2params { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ // technically, this is a CHOICE in RFC2898 but the other "choice" is, currently, more of a placeholder // in the RFC 'salt' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_OCTET_STRING], 'iterationCount' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER], 'keyLength' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER, 'optional' => true ], 'prf' => AlgorithmIdentifier::MAP + ['optional' => true] ] ]; }
